mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayAccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE DATE(detected_time) = CURDATE()) AS alertCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status IN ('NEW','ACKNOWLEDGED')) AS unresolvedAlertCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE is_active = 'Y') AS activeSourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE) AS totalSourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG) AS totalAccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'SELECT' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS selectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'UPDATE' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS updateCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'DELETE' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS deleteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'DOWNLOAD' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS downloadCount, (SELECT MAX(last_collect_time) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE) AS lastCollectTime, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N/A' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'INVALID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'INVALID' ELSE 'VALID' END FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_HASH_VERIFY) AS hashVerifyStatus, (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(completed_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_HASH_VERIFY) AS lastHashVerifyTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE pii_grade IS NOT NULL AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS piiAccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'NEW') AS alertNewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'NOTIFIED') AS alertNotifiedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'JUSTIFIED') AS alertJustifiedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'RESOLVED') AS alertResolvedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'DISMISSED') AS alertDismissedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'RE_JUSTIFY') AS alertReJustifyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'OVERDUE') AS alertOverdueCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'ESCALATED') AS alertEscalatedCount
SELECT HOUR(access_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = #{date} GROUP BY HOUR(access_time) ORDER BY hour
SELECT action_type AS actionType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = #{date} GROUP BY action_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ( source_system_id, user_account, user_name, department, access_time, client_ip, action_type, target_db, target_schema, target_table, target_columns, pii_type_codes, pii_grade, affected_rows, search_condition, sql_text, collect_type, access_channel, session_id, result_code, hash_value, prev_hash, collected_at, partition_key ) VALUES ( #{sourceSystemId}, #{userAccount}, #{userName}, #{department}, #{accessTime}, #{clientIp}, #{actionType}, #{targetDb}, #{targetSchema}, #{targetTable}, #{targetColumns}, #{piiTypeCodes}, #{piiGrade}, #{affectedRows}, #{searchCondition}, #{sqlText}, #{collectType}, #{accessChannel}, #{sessionId}, #{resultCode}, #{hashValue}, #{prevHash}, NOW(), DATE_FORMAT(#{accessTime}, '%Y%m%d') )

INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ( source_system_id, user_account, user_name, department, access_time, client_ip, action_type, target_db, target_schema, target_table, target_columns, pii_type_codes, pii_grade, affected_rows, search_condition, sql_text, collect_type, access_channel, session_id, result_code, hash_value, prev_hash, collected_at, partition_key ) VALUES
( #{item.sourceSystemId}, #{item.userAccount}, #{item.userName}, #{item.department}, #{item.accessTime}, #{item.clientIp}, #{item.actionType}, #{item.targetDb}, #{item.targetSchema}, #{item.targetTable}, #{item.targetColumns}, #{item.piiTypeCodes}, #{item.piiGrade}, #{item.affectedRows}, #{item.searchCondition}, #{item.sqlText}, #{item.collectType}, #{item.accessChannel}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.resultCode}, #{item.hashValue}, #{item.prevHash}, NOW(), DATE_FORMAT(#{item.accessTime}, '%Y%m%d') )
mapper.sql: a.log_id AS logId, a.source_system_id AS sourceSystemId, a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, a.department, a.access_time AS accessTime, a.client_ip AS clientIp, a.action_type AS actionType, a.target_db AS targetDb, a.target_schema AS targetSchema, a.target_table AS targetTable, a.target_columns AS targetColumns, a.pii_type_codes AS piiTypeCodes, a.pii_grade AS piiGrade, a.affected_rows AS affectedRows, a.search_condition AS searchCondition, a.sql_text AS sqlText, a.collect_type AS collectType, a.access_channel AS accessChannel, a.session_id AS sessionId, a.result_code AS resultCode, a.hash_value AS hashValue, a.prev_hash AS prevHash, a.collected_at AS collectedAt, a.partition_key AS partitionKey
mapper.select: SELECT , s.source_name AS sourceName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE s ON a.source_system_id = s.source_id WHERE a.log_id = #{logId}

where.if: AND (a.user_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.target_table LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT , s.source_name AS sourceName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE s ON a.source_system_id = s.source_id
ORDER BY a.access_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a
SELECT hash_value FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE ( source_id, source_name, source_type, db_name, db_type, hostname, port, schema_name, agent_id, description, collect_interval, table_filter, exclude_accounts, dac_select_sql, is_active, status, reg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{sourceId}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceType}, #{dbName}, #{dbType}, #{hostname}, #{port}, #{schemaName}, #{agentId}, #{description}, #{collectInterval}, #{tableFilter}, #{excludeAccounts}, #{dacSelectSql}, #{isActive}, 'STOPPED', #{regUserId} )
mapper.sql: source_id AS sourceId, source_name AS sourceName, source_type AS sourceType, db_name AS dbName, db_type AS dbType, hostname, port, schema_name AS schemaName, agent_id AS agentId, agent_last_heartbeat AS agentLastHeartbeat, agent_status AS agentStatus, description, collect_interval AS collectInterval, table_filter AS tableFilter, exclude_accounts AS excludeAccounts, dac_select_sql AS dacSelectSql, is_active AS isActive, status, last_collect_time AS lastCollectTime, total_collected AS totalCollected, error_msg AS errorMsg, reg_user_id AS regUserId, reg_date AS regDate, upd_user_id AS updUserId, upd_date AS updDate
mapper.select: SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE db_name = #{dbName} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE
AND (source_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR db_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE SET source_name = #{sourceName}, source_type = #{sourceType}, db_name = #{dbName}, db_type = #{dbType}, hostname = #{hostname}, port = #{port}, schema_name = #{schemaName}, agent_id = #{agentId}, description = #{description}, collect_interval = #{collectInterval}, table_filter = #{tableFilter}, exclude_accounts = #{excludeAccounts}, dac_select_sql = #{dacSelectSql}, is_active = #{isActive}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId} WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}
mapper.sql: status_id AS statusId, source_id AS sourceId, collect_start AS collectStart, collect_end AS collectEnd, last_offset AS lastOffset, collected_count AS collectedCount, status, error_msg AS errorMsg, retry_count AS retryCount, reg_date AS regDate

a.alert_id AS alertId, a.rule_id AS ruleId, a.rule_code AS ruleCode, a.severity, a.alert_title AS alertTitle, a.alert_detail AS alertDetail, a.target_user_id AS targetUserId, a.target_user_name AS targetUserName, a.related_log_ids AS relatedLogIds, a.detected_time AS detectedTime, a.status, a.resolved_by AS resolvedBy, a.resolved_time AS resolvedTime, a.resolve_comment AS resolveComment, a.reg_date AS regDate, a.upd_date AS updDate, a.notification_sent_at AS notificationSentAt, a.notification_token AS notificationToken, a.token_expires_at AS tokenExpiresAt, a.target_user_email AS targetUserEmail, a.justification, a.justification_summary AS justificationSummary, a.justified_at AS justifiedAt, a.justified_by AS justifiedBy, a.approver_id AS approverId, a.approval_comment AS approvalComment, a.approved_at AS approvedAt, a.sla_deadline AS slaDeadline, a.escalation_level AS escalationLevel

a.alert_id AS alertId, a.rule_id AS ruleId, a.rule_code AS ruleCode, a.severity, a.alert_title AS alertTitle, a.target_user_id AS targetUserId, a.target_user_name AS targetUserName, a.detected_time AS detectedTime, a.status, a.resolved_by AS resolvedBy, a.resolved_time AS resolvedTime, a.reg_date AS regDate, a.upd_date AS updDate, a.notification_sent_at AS notificationSentAt, a.token_expires_at AS tokenExpiresAt, a.target_user_email AS targetUserEmail, a.justification_summary AS justificationSummary, a.justified_at AS justifiedAt, a.justified_by AS justifiedBy, a.approver_id AS approverId, a.approved_at AS approvedAt, a.sla_deadline AS slaDeadline, a.escalation_level AS escalationLevel
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT ( rule_id, rule_code, severity, alert_title, alert_detail, target_user_id, target_user_name, related_log_ids, status ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{severity}, #{alertTitle}, #{alertDetail}, #{targetUserId}, #{targetUserName}, #{relatedLogIds}, 'NEW' )
mapper.select: SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE a.alert_id = #{alertId}

where.if: AND (a.alert_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.target_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id
ORDER BY a.detected_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a
SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id ORDER BY a.detected_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT SET status = #{status}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolved_time = NOW(), resolve_comment = #{resolveComment} WHERE alert_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE a.notification_token = #{token}
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT SET status = 'NOTIFIED', notification_sent_at = NOW(), notification_token = #{token}, token_expires_at = #{tokenExpiresAt}, target_user_email = #{targetUserEmail}, sla_deadline = #{slaDeadline} WHERE alert_id = #{alertId}

UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT SET status = 'JUSTIFIED', justification = #{justification}, justification_summary = LEFT(#{justification}, 500), justified_at = NOW(), justified_by = #{justifiedBy} WHERE alert_id = #{alertId}

UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT SET status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approval_comment = #{approvalComment}, approved_at = NOW(),
resolved_by = #{approverId}, resolved_time = NOW(), resolve_comment = #{approvalComment},
notification_token = #{newToken}, token_expires_at = #{newTokenExpiresAt}, justification = NULL, justification_summary = NULL, justified_at = NULL,
escalation_level = escalation_level WHERE alert_id = #{alertId}
mapper.select: SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE a.status = 'NOTIFIED' AND a.sla_deadline IS NOT NULL AND a.sla_deadline < NOW()

SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE a.status = 'OVERDUE' AND a.sla_deadline IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(a.sla_deadline, INTERVAL 24 HOUR) < NOW()
mapper.sql: rule_id AS ruleId, rule_code AS ruleCode, rule_name AS ruleName, description, severity, condition_type AS conditionType, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, time_window_min AS timeWindowMin, time_range_start AS timeRangeStart, time_range_end AS timeRangeEnd, target_action AS targetAction, target_pii_grade AS targetPiiGrade, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder, reg_user_id AS regUserId, reg_date AS regDate, upd_user_id AS updUserId, upd_date AS updDate
mapper.select: SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE ORDER BY sort_order, rule_code
mapper.sql: config_id AS configId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, description, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder, reg_user_id AS regUserId, reg_date AS regDate, upd_user_id AS updUserId, upd_date AS updDate
mapper.select: SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_id = #{configId}
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_type = #{configType} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT verify_id AS verifyId, verify_date AS verifyDate, total_records AS totalRecords, valid_records AS validRecords, invalid_records AS invalidRecords, first_invalid_id AS firstInvalidId, status, error_msg AS errorMsg, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt, reg_date AS regDate FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_HASH_VERIFY ORDER BY verify_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}

SELECT PARTITION_NAME AS partitionName, PARTITION_DESCRIPTION AS partitionDescription, TABLE_ROWS AS tableRows FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'COTDL' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_ACCESS_LOG' AND PARTITION_NAME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PARTITION_ORDINAL_POSITION
mapper.update: ${sql}
mapper.select: SELECT TABLE_ROWS FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'COTDL' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_ACCESS_LOG' AND PARTITION_NAME = #{partitionName}
SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}

SELECT owner, table_name AS tableName, COUNT(*) AS piiColumnCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT column_name ORDER BY column_name) AS piiColumns, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT piitype ORDER BY piitype) AS piiTypes, MAX(CASE WHEN audit_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS auditYn FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE WHERE db = #{dbName} AND piitype IS NOT NULL AND piitype != '' AND piitype != 'notpii' GROUP BY owner, table_name ORDER BY owner, table_name
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_METATABLE SET audit_yn = #{auditYn}, upddate = NOW() WHERE db = #{dbName} AND owner = #{owner} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND piitype IS NOT NULL AND piitype != '' AND piitype != 'notpii'
UPDATE COTDL.TBL_METATABLE SET audit_yn = NULL, upddate = NOW() WHERE db = #{dbName} AND audit_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT target_id AS targetId, db_name AS dbName, owner, table_name AS tableName, target_type AS targetType, description, is_active AS isActive, reg_user_id AS regUserId, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_BCI_TARGET WHERE db_name = #{dbName} ORDER BY owner, table_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_BCI_TARGET (target_id, db_name, owner, table_name, target_type, description, is_active, reg_user_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{targetId}, #{dbName}, #{owner}, #{tableName}, #{targetType}, #{description}, 'Y', #{regUserId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_type = VALUES(target_type), description = VALUES(description), is_active = 'Y', upd_user_id = VALUES(reg_user_id), upd_date = NOW()
mapper.update: DELETE FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_BCI_TARGET WHERE db_name = #{dbName}
mapper.select: SELECT m.table_name AS tableName, m.column_name AS columnName, m.piitype AS piiType, m.piigrade AS piiGrade, m.owner, t.target_type AS targetType FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_BCI_TARGET t LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_METATABLE m ON t.db_name = m.db AND t.owner = m.owner AND t.table_name = m.table_name WHERE t.db_name = #{dbName} AND t.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY t.owner, t.table_name, m.column_name

SELECT owner, table_name AS tableName, COUNT(CASE WHEN piitype IS NOT NULL AND piitype != '' AND piitype != 'notpii' THEN 1 END) AS piiColumnCount, COUNT(*) AS totalColumnCount FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE WHERE db = #{dbName} GROUP BY owner, table_name ORDER BY owner, table_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_EXCLUDE_SQL (source_type, pattern, match_type, description, is_active, reg_user_id) VALUES (#{sourceType}, #{pattern}, #{matchType}, #{description}, 'Y', #{regUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND status = 'RUNNING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status IN ('NEW','NOTIFIED','JUSTIFIED','OVERDUE','ESCALATED','RE_JUSTIFY')

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS accessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS accessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = CURDATE() AND TIME(access_time) BETWEEN #{timeStart} AND #{timeEnd} GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS deniedCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) AND result_code = 'DENIED' GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS piiAccessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) AND pii_grade = #{piiGrade} GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, target_table AS targetTable, COUNT(*) AS repeatCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) GROUP BY user_account, user_name, target_table HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, a.client_ip AS clientIp, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.log_id ORDER BY a.log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a WHERE a.access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND a.client_ip NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT client_ip FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND access_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND user_account = a.user_account ) GROUP BY a.user_account, a.user_name, a.client_ip

SELECT a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS accessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.log_id ORDER BY a.log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a JOIN COTDL.TBL_PIIBIZDAY b ON DATE_FORMAT(a.access_time, '%Y%m%d') = b.BASE_DT WHERE b.HLDY_YN = 'Y' AND a.access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY a.user_account, a.user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, MIN(a.log_id) AS logId, MIN(a.access_time) AS accessTime, COUNT(*) AS accessCount FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a WHERE a.access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND a.user_account NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_account FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{inactiveDays} DAY) AND access_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) ) GROUP BY a.user_account, a.user_name
mapper.sql: s.suppression_id AS suppressionId, s.rule_id AS ruleId, s.rule_code AS ruleCode, s.target_user_id AS targetUserId, s.suppression_type AS suppressionType, s.reason, s.severity_at_time AS severityAtTime, s.source_alert_id AS sourceAlertId, s.approved_by AS approvedBy, s.approved_at AS approvedAt, s.effective_from AS effectiveFrom, s.effective_until AS effectiveUntil, s.review_cycle_days AS reviewCycleDays, s.last_reviewed_at AS lastReviewedAt, s.last_reviewed_by AS lastReviewedBy, s.next_review_at AS nextReviewAt, s.review_comment AS reviewComment, s.is_active AS isActive, s.deactivated_by AS deactivatedBy, s.deactivated_at AS deactivatedAt, s.deactivate_reason AS deactivateReason, s.reg_user_id AS regUserId, s.reg_date AS regDate, s.upd_user_id AS updUserId, s.upd_date AS updDate
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION ( rule_id, rule_code, target_user_id, suppression_type, reason, severity_at_time, source_alert_id, approved_by, approved_at, effective_from, effective_until, review_cycle_days, next_review_at, is_active, reg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{targetUserId}, #{suppressionType}, #{reason}, #{severityAtTime}, #{sourceAlertId}, #{approvedBy}, NOW(), NOW(), #{effectiveUntil}, #{reviewCycleDays}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{reviewCycleDays} DAY), 'Y', #{regUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION s LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON s.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE s.suppression_id = #{suppressionId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND is_active = 'Y' AND effective_from <= NOW() AND effective_until >= NOW() AND (target_user_id IS NULL OR target_user_id = #{targetUserId})

SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION s LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON s.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE s.rule_id = #{ruleId} AND s.is_active = 'Y' AND s.effective_until >= NOW() AND (s.target_user_id IS NULL OR s.target_user_id = #{targetUserId}) ORDER BY s.effective_until DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT , r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION s LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON s.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE s.is_active = 'Y' AND s.next_review_at IS NOT NULL AND s.next_review_at <= NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION SET is_active = 'N', deactivated_by = 'system', deactivated_at = NOW(), deactivate_reason = '유효기간 만료 자동 비활성화' WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND effective_until < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT audit_id AS auditId, suppression_id AS suppressionId, action_type AS actionType, action_detail AS actionDetail, action_by AS actionBy, action_at AS actionAt FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_SUPPRESSION_AUDIT WHERE suppression_id = #{suppressionId} ORDER BY action_at DESC
